subject: [PMSH] Update filter
commit_message:
[PMSH] Update filter

User can edit/update the nfFilter to include/exclude selected NFs
Changelog and version update

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2531

Signed-off-by: egernug <gerard.nugent@est.tech>
